A Proud Achievement from KHAS Interior Architecture

Our student Dilara Geçgin has been awarded an Honorable Mention in the 2nd-year category at im2025, the eighth edition of the Interior Architecture Student Project Competition, held annually. We congratulate our student and wish her continued success.
